fields.title: task: remove dead fields/helpers (if truly unused)
fields.description:
Candidates:
- `extensions/tau/src/task/registry.ts`: `isDirectory()` appears unused.
- `extensions/tau/src/task/sessions.ts`: `workerSession` + `nestingDepth` fields and `setWorkerSession()` appear unused.

Goal:
- Delete unused code, or wire it up properly if it's meant to be used.

DoD:
- Unused symbols removed OR proven used.
- No behavior change.
- `npm -C extensions/tau test` passes.
fields.close_reason: Done: removed unused isDirectory from registry.ts and unused workerSession/nestingDepth fields and setWorkerSession method from sessions.ts.
